features: Extra Strong & Long Lasting: Each stick on air freshener in this 2-pack bundle is specially formulated to last up to 30 days, providing you with a total of 120 days of freshness. Perfect for keeping your outdoor bins smelling fresh.

Citronella Power: Infused with the natural scent of Citronella, Bin Brite's bin air fresheners are not just effective bin deodorisers; they also deter pests, making them ideal bin fresheners for both indoor and outdoor use.

Easy to Use: These stick on air fresheners for bin use a simple peel-and-stick application for hassle-free use. Just stick one to the inside lid of your kitchen bin or any outdoor bin to combat odours and keep spaces fresh.

Eco-Friendly Choice: Our bin scent fresheners are an environmentally responsible choice, designed to tackle bin odour without the use of harmful chemicals. Ideal for homes looking to maintain freshness in a more natural way.

Multipurpose Freshness: Not limited to just bins, these versatile stick on air fresheners can also be used on walls or in storage areas to keep your entire home smelling great. A perfect solution to eliminate odour and freshen up your living space.
description: Introducing Bin Brite's revolutionary Bin Fresheners - the ultimate solution to combat unpleasant smells and deter unwanted pests from your home. Our 2 pack of Bin Brite Stick On Outdoor Bin Freshener in Citronella is designed to offer you a hassle-free way to maintain a fresh and inviting environment around your bins. With Bin Brite, you're not just purchasing an ordinary bin air freshener; you're investing in a powerful Bin Odour Eliminator that lasts. Each stick-on air freshener is crafted to provide up to 30 days of freshness, totaling 120 days for this 2-pack set. It’s the perfect choice for households aiming to keep their kitchen bin and outdoor bins free from foul odours. Why settle for regular bin freshners when you can have the added benefit of Citronella's natural aroma? Known for its ability to repel bugs, Citronella ensures that your bins are not only fresh but also less attractive to pests. Easy to apply, These stick on air fresheners for Ourdoor bins and walls are designed for convenience. Simply peel and stick to the inside lid of any bin, or wherever else you need freshness. Whether it's a kitchen bin, outdoor bin, or even indoor spaces that need a bin refresher, Bin Brite has got you covered. Choose Bin Brite for an eco-friendly, effective way to tackle bin smell and enhance the ambiance of your home. These Bin Freshners are the perfect ally in your quest to eliminate bin odour while maintaining a pleasant and welcoming environment. Say goodbye to unpleasant bin smells and hello to freshness with Bin Brite, your go-to bin freshener and odour eliminator.
